prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.9 kg; Height 156.7 cm; BMI 24.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 242mg/dL; 9 months ago 227mg/dL; 6 months ago 269mg/dL; 3 months ago 286mg/dL; current 244mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.9kg; 9 months ago 62.9kg; 6 months ago 58.8kg; 3 months ago 59.7kg; current 59.9kg), Height (12 months ago 156.7cm; 9 months ago 156.7cm; 6 months ago 156.7cm; 3 months ago 156.7cm; current 156.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 123mg/g; 9 months ago 134mg/g; 6 months ago 142mg/g; 3 months ago 204mg/g; current 201mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 130mg/dL; 9 months ago 145mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
